calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Continued To Jul-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-20-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Continued To May-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian Wagner for Jessica Nasrah, Executor (via Zoom).
Emily Shugart, mother to minor beneficiaries Pearl and Vena Bradley, and on behalf of Luke Bradley (via Zoom).
Johanna Bradley, beneficiary (via Zoom).

Mr. Wagner reported that the only issue preventing the filing of the petition was resolution of a creditor's claim filed by Comcast in the amount of approximately $1,000. Counsel stated that Phillips and Cohen are still attempting to obtain backup documentation from Comcast to determine whether the claim had already been paid. Mr. Wagner indicated the estate would likely deny the claim if the documentation is not received soon. Mr. Wagner requested 45 days to allow for additional time.

The court continued the matter to May 20, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Emily Shugart and Johanna Bradley expressed frustration over delays. The court requested that Mr. Wagner speak to them after the hearing to answer any questions they may have.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Apr-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian Wagner for Jessica Nasrah, Executor (via Zoom).

Mr. Wagner reported that the outstanding creditor's claim involves a bill from Comcast, which the executor believes was already paid directly from trust assets around the same time the claim was filed. However, the payment was not transmitted to Phillips & Cohen, the debt collector handling the claim. Mr. Wagner stated that he requested the original bill from Phillips & Cohen and hopes to receive it within a few days to a week. Once received, he will either provide proof of payment (if previously paid) or pay the bill before filing the final petition for distribution.

The court continued the matter to April 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Continued To Mar-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian Wagner for Jessica Nasrah, Executor (via Zoom).

Mr. Wagner explained delays in filing a petition for final distribution, citing complications caused by one beneficiary's misunderstanding regarding an IRA account's inclusion in probate. Additional delays arose due to confusion from the IRA company about the identity of the executor. Mr. Wagner requested a 45-day continuance to complete and file the petition for final distribution.

The court continued the matter to March 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Continued To Jan-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Brian Wagner, Esq., for Jessica Nasrah, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges that this matter was continued from the last calling to allow Luke Wagner to hire counsel and/or file written objections and he was given a deadline to do so. The court notes that no written objections have been filed by the deadline and that Mr. Wagner is not present at today's hearing. The court confirms with counsel that he has not received any written objections. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-07-2023 is admitted to probate. Jessica Nasrah is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-17-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Park. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Continued To Dec-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brian Wagner appeared in person for Jessica Nasrah (petitioner).
Luke Bradley (pro/per) appeared in person (beneficiary).

Mr. Bradely stated he would like a brief continuance to retain counsel. Petition for Probate of will and letters testamentary is continued to December 05, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. File objections by November 28, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Martin: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Continued To Nov-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
